action.reasoning: Observation: 60 epochs reached val AP=0.2510 (eval confirmed). Training plateaued. Analysis: Have ~5.5h remaining and 17 iterations. To boost beyond 0.25, can train a bigger model (deeper/wider) for more epochs. Standard GIN-VN reaches ~0.27. Each epoch ~19s, plus 162s loading. With emb_dim=400, num_layers=5, ~80 epochs = ~25 min. Decision: Train deeper/wider model with more epochs.
